Projects.title: NeuralDraft
Projects.description: A real-time document editor with GPT-4 integration, contextual completions, and collaborative cursors. Designed for dev teams shipping fast.

Projects.title: OrbitCI
Projects.tagline: Visual pipeline builder for CI/CD workflows
Projects.description: Drag-and-drop CI/CD pipeline orchestrator with YAML export, multi-cloud runners, and real-time log streaming. Zero config by default.

Projects.title: Spectral UI
Projects.tagline: Design system generator from Figma tokens
Projects.description: Converts Figma design tokens into production-ready Chakra, MUI, or Tailwind themes. Supports dark mode, typography scales, and component overrides.

Projects.title: Echelon
Projects.description: High-frequency sports data platform with WebSocket feeds, predictive models, and exportable PDF reports. Built for analysts, not fans.

Projects.title: Phoneme
Projects.description: Lightweight WASM-powered transcription library using Whisper distilled models. Works fully offline. Sub-200ms latency on modern hardware.

Projects.title: Terrarium
Projects.tagline: Sandboxed code execution for LLM apps
Projects.description: Secure, isolated execution environment for running AI-generated code. Supports Python, JS, and Bash with resource quotas and audit logs.
